content: {"schema":"brainflow.policy.cli_arglen.v1","windows":{"max_inline_chars":4096,"prefer_response_files":true,"response_file_hint":"@<path>","prefer_temp_payload_file":true,"temp_dir":"${WORKSPACE}\\tmp","notes":"When building CLI commands, write large payloads to temp files and pass file paths instead of inlining JSON."}}
